failure_movement.justification: Prediction claimed unknown cluster shrinks 2-4, wrong stays flat. Actual: unknown exploded +60 (21→81), correct collapsed -52 (69→17), wrong shrank -7. Every directional claim is contradicted. Minimal credit only for noting unknown is the dominant failure mode.

trace_movement.justification: Prediction claimed token consumption rises 15-25%. Actual: prompt tokens dropped 42.5% (1592→916), completion dropped 50% (214→107)—completely wrong direction. Retry did fire for ~5 tasks (>16 retrieved), but prediction claimed 20-25 tasks; vast overestimate. Nearly all claims refuted.

side_effects.justification: Prediction explicitly stated 'No pass regressions expected.' Actual: 53 tasks regressed (pass→fail), a catastrophic regression. The falsification section vaguely anticipated token non-rise, but missed the core risk entirely. Near-zero credit.
